sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Icahn Enterprises' Q2 webcast replay will last at least 12 months
feed.summary: Icahn Enterprises L.P. (Nasdaq: IEP) announced it will host a webcast on Wednesday, August 5, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time, to discuss its second-quarter 2026 financial results. A replay of the webcast will be available for at least twelve months. The company, a diversified holding company, operates in seven primary business segments and encourages viewers to join 15 minutes early for the live event.

feed.title: Stryker Corp (SYK) Shares Surge 3.1% -- What GF Score of 92 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Stryker Corp (SYK) shares rose 3.1% on July 23, 2026, despite a year-to-date decline, and are considered 23.0% undervalued with a strong GF Score of 92/100. Despite this, insiders have sold $100.7 million in stock recently, raising caution for potential investors. The company's GF Value™ suggests an upside, but insider selling indicates potential challenges ahead, warranting thorough due diligence.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase Strengthens Board Independence With Bylaw Change
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase (JPM) has amended its By-laws to enhance board independence by requiring that any Lead Independent Director be appointed by non-management directors. This change, enacted on July 21, 2026, aims to strengthen oversight, transparency, and accountability for stakeholders. JPMorgan Chase's stock also received a "Buy" rating from analysts with a $375 price target, and Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates JPM as "Outperform" citing strong financial performance.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) Trading Down 2.9% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) experienced a 2.9% drop in share price during mid-day trading on Thursday, despite largely positive sentiment from Wall Street analysts who hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus. The company reported strong Q2 earnings, beating EPS and revenue expectations with significant year-over-year revenue growth. However, insider selling, including shares from directors James J. Goetz and Helle Thorning-Schmidt, has been noted.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.02 a Share, Payable Sept. 3 to Holders of Record Aug. 13
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.02 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on September 3rd to shareholders of record as of August 13th. This decision follows recent analyst adjustments to price targets for Ingersoll Rand, with Stifel maintaining a Hold rating.

feed.title: News | JLL grows New York retail team; Prologis picks global development head; Starwood promotes veteran to acquisition lead
feed.summary: JLL has expanded its New York retail team with the addition of Joshua Strauss and Scott Zinovoy, focusing on strengthening the firm's leasing capabilities. Prologis appointed Travis Harvey as global head of development and promoted Sheila Sutton to senior vice president for U.S. East development management. Starwood Capital Group named Qahir Madhany as head of acquisitions in the Americas, overseeing equity investments and real estate transactions.

feed.title: IonQ (NYSE:IONQ) Trading Down 1.6% - Here's Why
feed.summary: IonQ (NYSE:IONQ) shares dropped 1.6% on Thursday, closing at $34.12 on lower-than-average volume. The stock faces mixed sentiment, with positive news including new quantum AI research and institutional call buying, offset by concerns over its high valuation, negative margins, and profitability challenges. Despite these issues, Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $69.88.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Shares Down 1.5% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) shares experienced a 1.5% decline, trading around $146.94 with below-average volume. Despite the dip, analyst sentiment for P&G remains largely positive, holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $161.74. The company recently reported strong EPS of $1.59, surpassing estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.0885 per share, yielding approximately 3.0%.

feed.title: Former M&T Bank exec joins Pioneer board
feed.summary: Retired M&T Bank executive Mike Keegan has been appointed to the board of directors at Pioneer Bancorp Inc. Keegan, known in banking circles, retired last year before taking on this new role.

feed.title: Eversource, National Grid, EnergyHub, Sunrun, and the Mobility House Launch V2G Pilot in Massachusetts
feed.summary: Eversource, National Grid, EnergyHub, Sunrun, and The Mobility House have partnered to launch a vehicle-to-grid (V2G) pilot program in Massachusetts. This initiative will allow qualifying residential customers with V2G-capable electric vehicles to enroll in the existing ConnectedSolutions program, which currently utilizes flexible capacity from thermostats, batteries, and commercial resources to stabilize the electric grid. The pilot aims to assess how V2G technology can further enhance grid reliability and provide customers with opportunities to manage energy costs, leveraging the state's growing number of EVs.

feed.title: GE stock finds support as aerospace growth offsets spin-off transition
feed.summary: General Electric (GE) stock is finding support from double-digit growth in its aerospace segment and ongoing portfolio simplification, including the spin-off of its healthcare and energy divisions. The company's 2023 results highlighted stronger margins resulting from increased jet-engine demand and services. While aerospace and power segments show solid performance, the profitability of the renewables segment remains a key focus area for investors.

feed.title: Hartford (NYSE:HIG) Reports Q2 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
feed.summary: The Hartford (NYSE:HIG) reported its Q2 CY2026 earnings, meeting Wall Street's revenue expectations with a 4% year-on-year increase to $7.26 billion. The company's non-GAAP profit of $3.42 per share surpassed analyst estimates by 8.9%. Despite positive results in EPS and book value per share, the stock traded down 2% after the report, suggesting the market desired more substantial gains.

feed.title: Full Transcript: VeriSign Q2 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: VeriSign reported strong financial results for Q2 2026, including increased free cash flow and stable liquidity, and provided updated full-year guidance. The company highlighted significant growth in domain registrations, driven in part by AI's impact on digital identity, and outlined plans for the launch of the .web TLD with pricing and marketing flexibility. VeriSign also stressed its commitment to 100% service availability and its intention to roll out new security features to address AI-driven challenges.

feed.title: Digital Realty raises annual FFO forecast on robust data center demand
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust has increased its full-year forecast for funds from operations (FFO) and total revenue, driven by strong leasing momentum from cloud and AI customers. The company expects adjusted FFO between $8.15 and $8.20 per share and revenue between $6.85 billion and $6.95 billion for fiscal 2026. This positive outlook follows strong second-quarter results, with revenue of $1.92 billion and adjusted FFO of $2.65 per share, both beating analyst estimates, as Digital Realty benefits from the demand for generative AI computing power.

feed.title: Steakholder Foods Announces ADS Ratio Adjustment
feed.summary: Steakholder Foods Ltd. (Nasdaq: STKH) announced an adjustment to its American Depositary Shares (ADS) ratio, changing it from 1 ADS representing 4,000 ordinary shares to 1 ADS representing 12,000 ordinary shares, effective July 27, 2026. This adjustment effectively acts as a one-for-three reverse ADS split for ADS holders, requiring no action on their part. The company, a leader in 3D-printing technology for plant-based meat, will continue to trade on Nasdaq under the ticker "STKH".

feed.title: Old Second Bancorp: Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Old Second Bancorp (OSBC) reported second-quarter net income of $28.2 million, resulting in earnings of 54 cents per share, or 55 cents per share when adjusted for non-recurring costs. This exceeded Wall Street expectations. The financial holding company also reported revenue of $113.5 million for the period, surpassing Street forecasts, with net interest expense revenue at $99.8 million.

feed.title: Horizon Bancorp stock trades steady as latest quarterly results show modest loan and margin trends
feed.summary: Horizon Bancorp (HBNC) stock is trading steady as its latest quarterly results reveal moderate loan growth, stable net interest margins, and a cautious approach to credit quality. As a regional US bank, its revenue is primarily driven by net interest income, with additional contributions from noninterest income activities. The bank focuses on disciplined credit underwriting, managing interest rate risk, and maintaining core deposit relationships to ensure stability and growth.

feed.title: VEFU ETF Profile: Dividends, Returns (GETTEX:VEFU)
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed profile of the VanEck Biotech ETF (VEFU), including its dividends, returns, and key financial statistics. It covers assets under management, dividend yield, expense ratio, inception date, and the index it tracks, the MVIS US Listed Biotech 25. The profile also details the fund's holdings by sector and region, and addresses frequently asked questions regarding its investment strategy and performance.

feed.title: Crown Castle Raises 2026 AFFO Outlook Amid Transformation
feed.summary: Crown Castle (CCI) reported its Q2 2026 results, showing a decline in site rental revenues and net income year-over-year, but increased AFFO by 10%. The company raised its full-year 2026 AFFO outlook, driven by its strategic transformation into a pure-play U.S. tower operator following the sale of its Fiber and Small Cell businesses. Analyst ratings currently stand at a Buy with a $95.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates CCI as Neutral due to cash generation and technical trends tempered by balance-sheet fragility and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Tapestry Inc. stock falls Thursday, still outperforms market
feed.summary: Tapestry Inc. (TPR) stock fell 3.20% on Thursday, closing at $139.13. Despite the decline, the stock still outperformed the broader market, as the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also experienced drops of 1.21% and 0.97% respectively. This fall ended a two-day winning streak for Tapestry Inc.

feed.title: Match Group (MTCH) CFO receives new dividend equivalent awards
feed.summary: Match Group, Inc. CFO Steven Richard Bailey Jr. was awarded three grants of dividend equivalents on July 21, 2026, totaling 29, 172, and 382 units. These awards convert one-for-one into common stock and vest proportionately with related restricted stock units, subject to his continued service. The dividend equivalents accrue on RSUs with vesting schedules beginning as early as March 1, 2025, and extending through March 1, 2029.

feed.title: Match Group (MTCH) director receives new dividend equivalents award
feed.summary: Match Group, Inc. director Thomas McInerney was awarded 35 dividend equivalents on July 21, 2026. These equivalents, which convert to common stock on a one-for-one basis, accrued on restricted stock units that are set to vest on the earlier of June 16, 2027, or the next Annual Stockholder Meeting, provided he continues his service. Following this transaction, McInerney directly holds 35 dividend equivalents.

feed.title: Alabama governor, Southern Company join Trump data center pledge
feed.summary: Alabama Governor Kay Ivey and Southern Company have joined President Donald Trump's "Ratepayer Protection Pledge," an initiative aimed at ensuring consumers do not bear the cost of expanding data centers. Southern Company, parent of Alabama Power, committed to ensuring businesses driving growth pay for infrastructure upgrades. The voluntary pledge, supported by 23 governors and various tech companies, outlines commitments for data centers to cover generation resources, negotiate separate rate structures, and coordinate with grid operators, though policy analysts are skeptical of its effectiveness in lowering utility costs.

feed.title: McDonald's Sets Sept. 16 Date for $1.86 Dividend Payment
feed.summary: McDonald's Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.86 per share of common stock. This dividend is payable on September 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2026. The company emphasizes its investor relations website as a key channel for important disclosures.

feed.title: Labcorp Holdings Inc. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
feed.summary: Labcorp Holdings Inc. (LH) shares rose 3.40% on Thursday, reaching $291.02, despite a general market downturn where the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average both fell. This marks the stock's second consecutive day of gains, yet it still underperformed compared to its competitors. The increase occurred on a rough trading day for the broader stock market.

feed.title: Breaking News: Eli Lilly pays $38M to secure land for massive West Creek pharma facility
feed.summary: Eli Lilly recently acquired a 227-acre parcel in Goochland County for $38.39 million, marking a significant step towards its planned $5 billion, 1 million-square-foot manufacturing facility in West Creek. This facility is expected to produce bioconjugate and monoclonal antibody medicines, create 650 permanent jobs, and is part of a larger $50 billion investment in four U.S. plants. The land purchase and the ongoing debate over the necessary transmission line highlight the complexities of developing such a large-scale pharmaceutical production site.

feed.title: Rollins Inc 2Q 2026: Revenue $1.08B, EPS $0.3— 10-Q Summary
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. reported its second-quarter 2026 results, showing a revenue increase of 7.9% to $1.08 billion and diluted EPS of $0.3, up from $0.29 in the prior-year quarter. Net income remained largely flat at $143.91 million. The company achieved its 99th consecutive quarter of revenue growth, driven by strong performance in commercial, termite, and ancillary segments, and strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: HYG ETF Price Forecast: High-Yield Bonds Face Rising Downside Risk
feed.summary: The HYG ETF, a key indicator of risk appetite in the credit market, has broken down from a symmetrical triangle pattern, signaling increasing downside momentum. This breakdown, accompanied by high volume and a bearish trend continuation signal, suggests that high-yield bonds are facing rising downside risk. Key resistance is now at $79.46–$79.48, with the next major downside target at $78.57 and a potential measuring objective of $77.79.

feed.title: Biogen Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Biogen Inc. (BIIB) shares rose 1.46% to $200.62 on a generally down day for the stock market, outperforming the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average. The company's stock closed 8.69% below its 52-week high of $219.72, which was reached on June 29th.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Corp. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Shares of Texas Pacific Land Corp. (TPL) fell 1.74% on Thursday, closing at $425.55. This underperformance occurred on a generally down day for the stock market, with both the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average also declining. The stock's drop ended a two-day winning streak.

feed.title: Heritage Financial Q2 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: Heritage Financial reported a net interest margin increase to 3.99% in Q2 2026, driven by improved investment portfolio yields and decreased deposit costs, though total deposits decreased due to seasonal tax payments and a large depositor withdrawal. The company expects mid-single-digit annualized loan growth and moderate net interest margin growth, and their integration with Kitsap Bank is on track with system conversions planned for late September. Despite elevated merger-related expenses, credit quality remains strong, and the company repurchased 372,000 shares.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza (NYSE: DPZ) EVP Garcia exercises options, sells 12,430 shares
feed.summary: Kelly E. Garcia, EVP and Chief Tech & Data Officer of Domino's Pizza (NYSE: DPZ), exercised options to acquire 12,430 shares of common stock on July 22, 2026. On the same day, Garcia sold all 12,430 shares in open-market transactions, generating approximately $4.00 million in gross sale proceeds with an estimated pre-tax spread of $462,000. These transactions changed Garcia's direct holdings of common stock to 9,351.818 shares, with no remaining derivative securities.

feed.title: Assurant names Kelli Ertel chief communications officer
feed.summary: Assurant Inc. has appointed Kelli Ertel as its new Chief Communications Officer and Chief of Staff, effective immediately. Ertel will join the company's Management Committee and will be responsible for leading global communications, brand strategy, and the events team, while continuing her role as Chief of Staff to the President and CEO. This appointment aims to align the company's communication and brand capabilities with its business priorities.

feed.title: Genmab stock trades steadily as investors weigh recent earnings and oncology pipeline momentum
feed.summary: Genmab A/S stock is maintaining a steady trade as investors analyze the company's recent strong revenue growth from its antibody-driven oncology treatments and its positive profitability trends. The biotechnology company balances its established commercial products with significant investment in its pipeline of clinical-stage oncology assets, aiming for future growth. Key financial metrics show robust revenue expansion and healthy operating margins, distinguishing Genmab from earlier-stage biotechs still in development.

feed.title: NEWMONT Corp /DE/ Q2 2026: Revenue $6.12B, EPS $2.06— 10-Q Summary
feed.summary: NEWMONT Corp /DE/ reported strong Q2 2026 results with revenue of $6.12 billion and diluted EPS of $2.06, driven by higher precious metal prices. Net income reached $2.2 billion, an increase from the prior year. The company's revenue growth was further supported by the Ahafo North mine reaching commercial production and a completed divestiture program, although higher costs and a seismic event at Cadia impacted operations.

feed.title: Newmont Reported Strong Earnings and Cash Flow. The Stock Is Down.
feed.summary: Newmont reported stronger-than-expected second-quarter earnings, attributed to effective cost control despite a drop in gold prices. However, the company's stock experienced a decline following the earnings report. The article highlights this paradox of strong financial performance juxtaposed with negative stock movement.

feed.title: Phase 3 trial of epcoritamab in relapsed/refractory DLBCL misses primary overall survival endpoint in U.S.
feed.summary: Genmab and AbbVie announced that their Phase 3 EPCORE DLBCL-1 trial for epcoritamab, a treatment for relapsed or refractory diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL), did not meet its primary endpoint of overall survival in the U.S. The trial compared epcoritamab to chemoimmunotherapy in patients ineligible for stem cell transplant. Despite this setback, epcoritamab retains its FDA accelerated approval and ongoing studies are exploring its use in combination therapies and other lymphoma indications.

feed.title: Newmont Q2 Adjusted EPS, Sales Rise
feed.summary: Newmont (NEM) reported a rise in its Q2 adjusted EPS and sales, with adjusted EPS reaching $0.46 compared to $0.41 in the prior-year quarter. Sales increased by 5.3% to $3.16 billion, slightly exceeding analyst expectations. The company also declared a dividend of $0.25 per share.

feed.title: Heritage Global stock trades on earnings context and market data
feed.summary: Heritage Global Inc. reported first-quarter 2026 revenue of $31.5 million, an increase of 6.4% year-over-year. Despite the revenue growth, the company posted a net loss of $2.8 million and an adjusted EBITDA of $3.3 million. The article notes that higher revenue did not translate into bottom-line profit and highlights the company's $0.0 million market capitalization as a key valuation marker for investors.

feed.title: Veralto expands ultraviolet water treatment
feed.summary: Veralto Corp. has acquired Alfaa UV, a leading Indian provider of ultraviolet water treatment solutions, to enhance its capabilities and expand its presence in the Asia-Pacific region. Alfaa UV, with over 20 years of experience in industrial and commercial applications such as pharmaceutical, food and beverage, and building services, will be integrated into Veralto's Trojan Technologies business to establish a stronger commercial footprint in India and the broader Asia-Pacific market. This acquisition aims to strengthen Veralto's position in the ultraviolet water treatment sector.

feed.title: Which Is the Better iShares Bond ETF for Your Tax Bracket: IGIB or MUB?
feed.summary: This article compares two iShares bond ETFs, IGIB and MUB, to help investors determine which is better suited for their tax bracket. IGIB, the iShares 5-10 Year Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETF, offers a higher dividend yield but its income is fully taxable. MUB, the iShares National Muni Bond ETF, provides tax-exempt municipal bonds with lower historical volatility, making it potentially more advantageous for investors in higher tax brackets.

feed.title: This Insmed Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Tuesday
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst Connor Mackay initiated coverage on Insmed Inc (NASDAQ: INSM) with an Outperform rating and a price target of $192. This article also highlights four other new analyst coverages: Axsome Therapeutics Inc (NASDAQ: AXSM) with an Outperform rating and $310 price target from BMO Capital, American Healthcare REIT Inc (NYSE: AHR) with a Buy rating and $70 price target from Compass Point, Trevi Therapeutics Inc (NASDAQ: TRVI) with an Outperform rating and $36 price target from BMO Capital, and Eledon Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ: ELDN) with a Buy rating and $12 price target from Rodman & Renshaw. These initiations reflect a bullish outlook on several pharmaceutical and healthcare companies.

feed.title: The Joint Corp. to Report 2026 Second Quarter Results on Thursday, August 6 and Host Conference Call and Webcast
feed.summary: The Joint Corp. announced it will report its 2026 second quarter financial results on Thursday, August 6, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a conference call and webcast at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day, featuring President and CEO Sanjiv Razdan and CFO Scott Bowman who will review results and provide a business update. Details for accessing the live broadcast, webcast, and audio replay are provided for shareholders and interested participants.

feed.title: Goldman Offers Way to Trade AI Junk Bonds $250 Million at a Time
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase have introduced new products to help investors manage their exposure to tech industry debt, particularly concerning the anticipated bond sales for AI investments. Goldman's offering allows trading a basket of bonds from 18 US high-yield issuers in $250 million increments, including companies like CoreWeave Inc., Applied Digital Corp., and Cipher Digital Inc. This move addresses growing concerns about substantial future debt issuance by hyperscalers for AI.

feed.title: Insmed (INSM) insider William Lewis plans 10,700-share stock sale
feed.summary: Insmed Inc. (INSM) insider William Lewis has filed to sell 10,700 shares of common stock through Merrill Lynch, categorized as Stock Plan Activity, with the transaction dated July 23, 2026. The filing also details prior sales made by Lewis over the past three months, including seven separate transactions between May 4 and July 9, 2026, with share amounts ranging from 6,515 to 25,564. This indicates ongoing stock plan activity by the insider.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences soars 6% on strong Q2 results, raised sales guidance
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) reported strong second-quarter results, surpassing analyst expectations for both earnings and revenue, and subsequently saw its shares jump over 6% after hours. The company also raised its full-year sales guidance for constant currency growth and specific product categories like TAVR and TMTT, reflecting confidence in its comprehensive portfolio and strategic execution. For Q3 2026, Edwards Lifesciences projects total sales between $1.63 billion and $1.71 billion and adjusted EPS of $0.71 to $0.77.

feed.title: ZoomInfo's Data Says Jersey Mike's Franchise System Is Consolidating Fast Ahead of Its IPO
feed.summary: New analysis by ZoomInfo reveals that Jersey Mike's franchise system is rapidly consolidating into the hands of larger, multi-unit operators in anticipation of its planned IPO. The data, which combines Jersey Mike's S-1, franchise disclosure filings, and ZoomInfo's proprietary dataset, shows a significant increase in franchisee-to-franchisee M&A, with virtually no store failures or non-renewals. This trend indicates a shift towards a more professionalized operator base, with a substantial portion of new store development coming from existing franchise owners who often operate multiple brands.

feed.title: 20/20 Biolabs Received Notice of Noncompliance
feed.summary: 20/20 Biolabs (AIDX) received a noncompliance notice from Nasdaq because its stock traded below $1.00 for 30 consecutive business days. The company has 180 days, until January 13, 2027, to regain compliance by maintaining a $1.00 bid price for at least 10 consecutive business days, or face potential delisting. This information is based on an SEC filing from July 22, 2026.

feed.title: Which Long-Term Bond ETF Is the Better Buy: State Street's SPLB or Vanguard's VGLT?
feed.summary: This article compares two long-term bond ETFs, State Street's SPLB and Vanguard's VGLT, highlighting their different risk profiles and investment strategies. SPLB offers a higher yield through corporate debt but carries credit risk, while VGLT focuses on the safety of U.S. Treasury securities with lower yield. Investors must weigh credit risk versus interest rate sensitivity when choosing between these funds.

feed.title: ICICI Bank (NYSE: IBN) releases June 30, 2026 earnings call transcripts
feed.summary: ICICI Bank (NYSE: IBN) has released the transcripts for its media conference call and earnings call related to the financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. These transcripts are accessible on the bank's website and provide insights into discussions with media, analysts, and investors regarding the bank's performance. This disclosure was made via a Form 6-K filing with the SEC.
